title: The Ultra-Rich Pay 8.2% Tax While You Pay 22%
hook: Billionaires found a legal strategy to live on millions tax-free while you hand over 22% — and it's been hiding in plain sight.
angle: Most finance content tells you to save more. This reveals the structural tax advantage the ultra-wealthy use that ordinary income earners simply can't access — called Buy, Borrow, Die.
audience: Middle-class earners frustrated by their tax burden who want to understand wealth-building strategies used by the ultra-wealthy
key_numbers: Top 400 Americans paid an average effective tax rate of just 8.2% (ProPublica/IRS data)
Borrowing $50M against a portfolio at 4% costs $2M in interest vs $37M in income tax on $100M
Step-up in basis at death eliminates all unrealized capital gains — heirs inherit tax-free
